codeList:
# new-values.yaml
minio:
  resources:
     limits:
       cpu: 2
       memory: 8Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yam;
minio:
  zones: 2
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
kafka:
  resources:
     limits:
        cpu: 2
        memory: 12Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
kafka:
  replicaCount: 4
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
pulsar:
  broker:
    resources:
       limits:
         cpu: 4
         memory: 16Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
pulsar:
  bookkeeper:
    resources:
       limits:
         cpu: 4
         memory: 16Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
pulsar:
  bookkeeper:
    volumes:
      journal:
        size: 20Gi
        storageClassName: gp3
# new-values.yaml
pulsar:
  broker:
    replicaCount: 3
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
pulsar:
  bookkeeper:
    replicaCount: 3
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
etcd:
  resources:
     limits:
       cpu: 2
       memory: 8Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
etcd:
  replicaCount: 5
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus

anchorList.label: 擴充 Milvus 的相依性
增加每個 MinIO pod 的資源
新增一個額外的 MinIO 伺服器池 (建議)
增加每個 Kafka 代理 pod 的資源
新增額外的 Kafka 代理商池（建議）
增加每個 Pulsar 經紀人 pod 的資源
增加每個 Pulsar 莊家 pod 的資源
新增額外的 Pulsar 代理 pod
新增一個額外的 Pulsar bookie pod (建議)
增加每個 etcd pod 的資源 (建議)
